categories.description: Then you're in the right place! Changing cars, travelling, or renovating your home… We have the turnkey financing solution to help you fulfil your wishes at every stage of your life. Choose a SOrloz personal loan now and make your projects a reality with ease! How much do you need?

promo.eco.description: Buying a hybrid or electric vehicle, or planning energy renovation work? Get a special rate for your environmentally friendly projects with our eco-responsible personal loan.

promo.winter.subtitle: Winter is coming.

faq.title: We're here to help
faq.a1: SOrloz is your trusted partner for financing your personal projects. As a specialist in consumer credit, we offer solutions tailored to every stage of your life, with human support and a 100% online process.
faq.q2: How do I apply for a loan online?
faq.a2: It's simple: use our simulator to estimate your monthly payment, fill in your personal information and sign your contract electronically. You'll receive a decision in principle in just a few clicks.
faq.q3: Why apply for an online loan with SOrloz?
faq.a3: SOrloz offers a quick response, a 100% online process and funds available within 48h after your application is accepted. Our team of experts is available to guide you every step of the way.
faq.q4: How to guard against cyber threats or react in the event of fraud?
faq.a4: Never share your access codes or passwords by phone or email. SOrloz will never ask for them. If in doubt or if fraud is suspected, contact our customer service immediately.
contact.headline: We're listening.
about.tagline: A range of financing solutions developed by
about.description: With SOrloz, we bring useful solutions to finance your projects towards a better tomorrow. A better tomorrow for you, where your projects come to life quickly. A better tomorrow for all of us, because we believe that you will, at your own scale, carry out certain projects that will have a positive impact and make sense for the common good.
about.company: SOrloz Financial Services is a key player in financing with nearly 40 years of expertise and a strong commitment to the common good. As the first independent lender to obtain mission-driven company status, SOrloz places responsibility at the heart of its business.
footer.legal: A subsidiary of SOrloz Financial Group, a committed player in responsible financing in France.
